must_detect.matched_text:
r the Indian securities regulator’s Prohibition of Insider Trading framework (ISLA PIT), draft Q4 results and the Ridgeway Polymers Pvt Ltd term sheet are unpublished price-sensitive information (UPSI) until the BNX filing.
The trading window remains closed 20–30 Jun; designated insiders including Ms. Kavya Dhandekar (Company Secretary) and Mr. Rohan Bhise (CFO; Passport N5930241) have acknowledged pre-clearance obligations.
Data room access is restricted; documents labeled “Revenue Guidance 2026” and “Customer Rate Cards” must not be forwarded beyond compliance@kalyanfaiz.in without approval.
Vendor KYC: Kalyanfaiz Industries Limited GSTIN 27KFLTA1234Q1Z2; Registered Office: Plot 23, Vidyut Marg, Shantipura, Pune, Maharashtra 411234; phone +91-78609-44321.
Accounts payable details for disclosure: Nirmal Cooperative Bank, IFSC NIRL0004567, Account No. 024561234567; UPI ID kfl.ap@nirbank (for vendor payments only).
Do not collect Aadhaar for employees unless necessary and consented; note that “Aadhaar 1234 5678 9101” submitted by a contractor failed checksum verification and must be redacted from files.
Child data: internship applicants under 18 (e.g., Master Ishan Morpankar, 16) require verifiable parental consent before processing; maintain consent artefacts in line with DPDPA.
Routine helplines such as 112, 1098, or a generic 1800-000-0000 toll-free number are not company contacts and should not be stored in the stakeholder directory.
For individual contractors, collect PAN and phone only after consent; sample form fields “Name: __________”, “PAN: __________”, “Email: __________” in draft templates are placeholders and not live data.
A PAN recorded as ABCTY1234Z on an invoice appears inconsistent with the proprietor’s records; obtain the corrected PAN directly via the secure portal before onboarding.
Pre-clearance exceptions: role-only designees (the CFO, the Head of Strategy) remain on the restricted list even if unnamed in email threads; avoid circulating price-sensitive decks to “All Staff”.
